name: Campbell's Soup Casserole Sauce Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
To substitute for one can condensed soup:
1. In a saucepan, mix 1/3 cup of the dry mix with 1 1/4 cups water.
2. Cook and stir until thickened.
3. Add cheese, mushroom bits, or celery to replicate the canned soup in your recipe.
